CompositeConfig.Name: DocumentAttachment
CompositeConfig.Description: Uploads a file and attaches it to a newly created document record in three steps: prepare binary storage, create the document, then link the attachment

Documentation.TagDescription:
**Document Attachment**

Attach a file to a new document in Exact Synergy. Internally creates a Binary (file storage), a Document record, and a DocumentAttachment (the link between them).

MethodDescriptions.POST: Attach a file to a new document

MethodDocumentation.POST: Provide the file content under `Binary`, the document metadata (type, subject) under `Document`, and the file name/extension under `Attachment`. The endpoint handles the three Exact API calls in order and wires the IDs together automatically.
